content:
I am a sole freelance web developer, work has been slow lately so i had some time on my hands.
Okay so, I have been making this maybe SaaS app which basically monitors 5 basic stats about any site you give it. and when any stat falls below the threshold it sends a email alert.
It also provides a custom branded customer facing status page to give to clients, do you guys think custom domains for this is a imp feature?
I am making this with freelancers in mind so they can add clients' sites here and can just keep an eye on 1 dashboard to monitor all sites for free.
so, should i keep building this or am i wasting my time and tokens?
live at: https://sitewell.darkentech.com

  submitted by   /u/dark_knocker
[link]   [comments]
